title: Gently Smoky Argentinian Sugar Snap Peas Bowl
description: A smoky and aerated ovo-vegetarian Argentinian dish featuring sugar snap peas, served in a dolsot stone bowl with ssam wrap, perfect for meal prep.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and arrange the sugar snap peas in a single layer.
Drizzle the olive oil over the sugar snap peas and sprinkle with salt, black pepper, and smoked paprika.
Roast the sugar snap peas in the preheated oven for 12 minutes, or until tender.
Meanwhile, prepare the ssam wrap by cutting it into large pieces and setting aside.
In a small bowl, whisk together the chimichurri sauce, garlic, and lemon juice.
To assemble the bowls, divide the roasted sugar snap peas among four dolsot stone bowls.
Drizzle the chimichurri sauce mixture over the sugar snap peas and top with crumbled feta cheese.
Serve the bowls with ssam wrap pieces on the side, for wrapping and eating.
Allow each person to assemble their own bowl to their liking.
